name: Peppermint Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the milk chocolate candy by finely chopping milk chocolate candy bars.
2. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes. Cool.
3. Soften gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Combine cream cheese and sugar, mixing at medium speed on electric mixer until well blended.
5. Gradually add gelatin, milk, and peppermint candy, mixing until blended. Chill until slightly thickened but not set.
6. Fold in whipped cream and chocolate. Pour over crust.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Garnish with additional whipped cream combined with crushed peppermint candies, if desired.
